title: AI News to Suggests -- fetch, filter, queue, and act on improvement items
desc: Twice-daily (11:00/18:00) pipeline: fetch HN + 9 YouTube AI channels, Gemini-filter for WKAppBot relevance with improvement DIRECTION, register as [AI-NEWS] suggests, triage and delegate work.
steps: OVERVIEW: Full AI news → improvement pipeline. Runs on-demand or scheduled (11:00/18:00). Fetches HN stories, Gemini-filters for WKAppBot relevance (score>=3), registers [AI-NEWS] suggests with improvement DIRECTION, then triages and starts work on top items.

STEP 1 — FETCH: bash <repo-root>/bin/wkappbot.hq/scripts/ai-news-briefing.sh
Fetches 15 stories from 5 HN keyword queries, Gemini-scores each, registers items with score>=3 as [AI-NEWS] suggests (with DIRECTION line), posts to Slack, speaks summary. Fallback: top 3 raw if Gemini returns nothing.

STEP 2 — REVIEW: wkappbot suggest list
Look for [AI-NEWS] tagged items. Each has a DIRECTION line from Gemini describing the WKAppBot improvement to make.

STEP 3 — TRIAGE (optional): For top item, ask triad to validate direction before starting work:
wkappbot ask triad "[AI-NEWS] improvement: DIRECTION -- worth doing now vs backlog? technical blockers?"
Skip triage for simple/clear improvements.

STEP 4 — DELEGATE WORK: For mechanical implementation:
wkappbot ask codex --agent "implement: DIRECTION"
For design-level changes: ask triad first, then codex. Resolve suggest after completion:
wkappbot suggest resolve TS "done: summary" --i-completed-the-code-and-built-successfully-... evidence.cmd

SCHEDULE SETUP (run once after Eye start):
wkappbot schedule add --prompt "run ai-news briefing" --cmd "bash <repo-root>/bin/wkappbot.hq/scripts/ai-news-briefing.sh" --at 11:00 --repeat 24h
wkappbot schedule add --prompt "run ai-news briefing" --cmd "bash <repo-root>/bin/wkappbot.hq/scripts/ai-news-briefing.sh" --at 18:00 --repeat 24h

FILTER KEYWORDS (edit in script QUERIES array): AI desktop automation agent 2026 / Claude computer use MCP tool / Windows UI automation accessibility / LLM agent framework tool use / AI code agent computer control

GEMINI PROMPT FORMAT: Scores 1-5, outputs SCORE/TITLE/URL/DIRECTION blocks for score>=3. DIRECTION = one-sentence WKAppBot improvement direction. Fallback registers top 3 raw if Gemini returns nothing.
SCRIPT: bin/wkappbot.hq/scripts/ai-news-briefing.sh -- HN Algolia API fetch + python3 dedup + Gemini filter + suggest register + Slack post + speak announce
SUGGEST TAG: [AI-NEWS] prefix. Filter: wkappbot suggest list -- search for AI-NEWS. Resolve: wkappbot suggest resolve TS "note" --i-completed-... evidence.cmd
author: claude
